title: Measurement Category
description: Coarse classification for vendor-defined measurement metrics. Carried on each metric in the agent's `get_adcp_capabilities.measurement.metrics[]` for semantic categorization, and used by AAO and buyer agents to aggregate or filter the per-vendor catalogs after they're crawled. Closed enum chosen for stability — buyers can write category-based queries that don't break when a new vendor enters the market with a slightly different category label.
